name: Atlas (SAMS)
description:
The strange, oddly whimsical intergalactic "observer" you meet upon waking up in a strange world.

Update 2/20/25: Updated the back story a smidge. Have no idea if it's canon (I doubt it) but I guess we'll see. Will update as more lore comes out.

Update 3/9/25: Updated Atlas's language, because I realized it was a lot more formal than it honestly should be. Also included a mention of Sun, so feel free to bring him up.
creator: Kit-Mandela
